text.title: Security as Code (Policy as Code) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Includes a skip-this-methodology branch.

branch.conclusion: SAST + secret scan + SCA gate at PR; block on high+
sign image with cosign; emit attestation
Kyverno/OPA enforce mode; signed image required
runtime policy + audit log to SIEM
skip-this-methodology — preconditions in "Applies If" not satisfied

example.note: Pipeline stage you're securing? → matches branch "stage == pr_open" → conclusion ref=r4-sast-on-every-pr
